task_completion.description: The TitanicSurvival dataset is loaded into Jamovi.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Jamovi spreadsheet view is visible showing data columns such as 'passengerClass' and 'survived'.

task_completion.description: The Chi-Square Test of Independence is configured with 'passengerClass' and 'survived'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Jamovi analysis setup panel for Contingency Tables, 'passengerClass' and 'survived' are assigned to the Rows and Columns fields.

task_completion.description: Expected counts, row percentages, and Cramér's V are selected in the analysis options.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Checkboxes for 'Expected counts', 'Row' (under Percentages), and 'Cramér's V' (under Nominal) are checked in the Jamovi analysis options panel.

task_completion.description: The results panel displays the Chi-Square test results, including the required statistics.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Jamovi results pane shows a Contingency Table with expected counts and row percentages, and a Chi-Square Tests table showing a Chi-square value around 127.86, df of 2, p < 0.001, and Cramér's V around 0.31.

task_completion.description: The Jamovi project is saved as 'TitanicChiSquare.omv'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A save dialog showing the filename 'TitanicChiSquare.omv' or the Jamovi window title displaying 'TitanicChiSquare.omv'.

task_completion.description: A text report is created containing the Chi-square statistic, degrees of freedom, p-value, and Cramér's V.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor window or terminal shows the contents of 'chisquare_report.txt' containing the values for Chi-square (~127.86), df (2), p-value (<0.001), and Cramér's V (~0.31).

integrity.description: The agent used the Jamovi GUI to perform the analysis.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the Jamovi application interface (menus, dialogs, results pane) rather than just running a Python or R script in the terminal.

integrity.description: The results in the report match the output generated in Jamovi.
integrity.visual_evidence: The values in the text report correspond to the values visible in the Jamovi results pane, indicating they were not just hardcoded or copied from external sources.

integrity.description: The report file was actually created and saved.
integrity.visual_evidence: A text editor shows the file saved as 'chisquare_report.txt' or a terminal command shows the creation of the file at the correct path.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected Chi-square statistic is approximately 127.86 (acceptable range: 115.0 - 145.0), degrees of freedom is 2, p-value is < 0.001, and Cramér's V is approximately 0.31 (acceptable range: 0.28 - 0.36).
